deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1. Template for property analysis tool.
deals.next: Chris to pull MLS and RPR data. Build analysis sheet. Lock template.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for analysis tool build.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land deal. Listing canceled. Signs picked up. No path forward with Isaac development concept or traditional sale. Sisters ended listing after March.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Walking away from deal. No path forward.
Price adjustment needed. Development angle with Isaac on hold pending mobile home project confirmation.
Isaac showed development interest. Sisters excited about mobile home concept. Need formal offer conversation.
Showing occurred. Sisters enthusiastic about Isaac meeting discussion.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: VA loan. Underwater by $93K-$143K. 208 DOM. Double-carrying. Termination executed May 29. Clients moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting.
deals.next: Obtain signed termination release. Archive file.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back in to repair and relist when ready.
Call completed. Chandler was laid off. Honest conversation on three paths. Leaning short sale. Relationship intact.
Where Things Stand email sent. Three options presented. Commission reduction discussed.
Critical underwater situation. Market value $350K-$400K vs payoff $493K. 717 Jack Nicklaus listed at $519K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Laura Heights PUD. Relocating to NC. June deadline. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Pre-inspection offered. Investor cash offer at $176.3K discussed.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offer.

logs.m: Second-look buyers back for second showing. Their favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled to May 30.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed with sellers. Kept conversation open.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Neighborhood canvassed. First showing 9:15am.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 14.
Listing consultation on-site. CMA recommended $259,900. Foundation crack discussed. Loan payoff discrepancy flagged.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction. $152,000. Closed and funded Apr 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary.
deals.next: Deliver gifts. Thank you notes. Post-close follow-up with Joyce.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Cash transaction complete.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Release delivered to Chicago Title.
Called Reliable Title. Confirmed lien prepared at Deeds.com. Chicago Title underwriting confirmed release required.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (family member). Willing to work with Chris on lien resolution.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113,000. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer's agent Javier. Payoff ~$257K estimated May 2026.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email (possible typo).

logs.m: New qualified buyer: Espinoza family. TXR 1903 sent to Javier. EMD not received. Another agent interested with backup offer.
Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Clearing complete. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Photos being posted. Drone footage flagged as priority. First offer dead.
Current offer basically dead. Option money not received. Steve still clearing property.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned. Renovation in progress with Matt Toney (SA Remodelers). Drywall crew patching. Utilities unconfirmed. Police report pending. Listing agreement still needed for Jerry and Ray.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility status. Replace camera batteries. Submit listing agreement to bank. Establish timeline once work complete.

logs.m: Police reports still pending. Utilities unconfirmed. Listing agreement not yet submitted to bank.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Update email to Kelly/Jerry/Ray pending.
Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed. Transformer number to grab.
Work officially started. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met with Matt Toney. Connected with Jerry Sadler on phone. Goal: work starts by next Monday.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 4.05 acres. 3BR/2BA. Divorce situation. Payoff $255,578 (Feb 2026, est $257K May 2026). Need $285K-$290K to walk with proceeds. CMA pulled May 15. Recommended $295,000 start price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property 10am. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Net sheet built. Files saved.
Prior clients helped with VA renovation loan. Divorcing. Need to finish renovation and sell.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold. Pivoting from new construction to evaluating 301 W Saxet wholesale deal (Corpus Christi, $85K). Isaac Linares brought the deal. FHA 203(k) financing angle being explored with Zach Schaphorst. LT flagged as possible financing partner.
leads.next: Follow up after Isaac and Mike phone call. Loop in LT. Confirm 203(k) feasibility. If deal falls through, revisit new construction search.

logs.m: Isaac brought wholesale at 301 W Saxet, $85K. Connected Mike/Alice with Isaac. Zach sent property info for 203(k) eval.
Text from Mike: rental selling. 916 Marriott passed (foundation issues). Pivoting to new construction entirely.
Sent showingnew.com link for new construction search. Waiting on engagement.

leads.title: Bryce (Wife is VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 renovation. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio. Looking to buy in San Antonio area. Zero down, no PMI power.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info on next 181 CR visit. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

logs.m: Met at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Recently relocated from Ohio. Renting now.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent (Schertz/Cibolo area). Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation caught up on May 11. Details pending follow-up.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property needs.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Buyer needs fixer property. Details pending call.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran connection (his mom). New construction buyer. $50K down target. Target payment ~$1,000/month P&I. Plan to rent 2 years then occupy. Builders pulling inventory options. Budget range $224K-$324K depending on rate buydowns.
leads.next: Confirm buyer rep signature. Finalize budget and rate scenarios. Register as agent on first builder visit. Set up new home search platform.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent via Skyslope. MI Homes option from Frank in play. Confirm if reviewed.
MI Homes option found keeping payments under $1,200/mo. Multiple builder options working.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing contact. Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: 8527 Green Bliss rental setup for uncle Jimbo (scaled back/ended May 28), and mom (Milagros) new construction buyer deal (active).
leads.next: Focus on mom deal. PM options sent. New construction search active.

logs.m: Reached out to builders. Price point strategy across rate scenarios ($224K-$324K range).
Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Builder outreach template drafted.
Visited Grace Gardens. Builder rep not on site. Content shot for Lennar, DR Horton, MI Homes.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Property at 13810 Tangle Tree St. ~90% complete. Currently working with another realtor. Open to selling as-is. Community-first relationship, no pressure. Pre-market buyer opportunity potential.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to Chris network. If current realtor relationship fails, positioned as natural next call.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Has property 90% done. Working with realtor but open to selling as-is.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor's Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind may have passed away. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Community connection warm intro available. Probate or inherited property potential sale.
leads.next: Get son name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out to son. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned son inherited house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Warm intro available.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes details. Report back to Kurt with analysis.

logs.m: Priority: pull CMA and get everything together. Set up listing timeline with photos and pricing.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Met through garden share group. Content collaboration potential (with permission). Long-term trust-based real estate potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Keep nurturing, no rush on real estate.

logs.m: Connected through garden community. Healing through plants story angle. Needs permission for content.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Full intake pending. Buy box and strategy unknown. Met in person. Likely Schertz area focus. Actively bringing wholesale deals (301 W Saxet to Mike/Alice Howell at $85K). Adam is his partner. Multiple collaborations active.
leads.next: Full Sage intake if not completed. Buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold strategy. Keep deal flow active.

logs.m: Brought 301 W Saxet wholesale deal at $85K. Connected Mike/Alice with Isaac directly.
Met with Isaac at 10023 Mill Path listing consultation. Partner Adam present. Both interested in working together.
